iEdison Description: iEdison Invention Report Number this utilization report is associated with
Transformation Notes: Use the stored iEdison report number on the Technology record. Dedicated field recommended (see Gap Candidates).

iEdison Description: Fiscal year for which this utilization report is being submitted
Transformation Notes: No annual reporting year concept in TTS. A new Utilization Report object (or at minimum a year field) is needed to support annual submissions.

iEdison Description: Latest stage of development: Commercialized, Licensed, Not Licensed or Commercialized
Transformation Notes: Coarse mapping: 'Commercialisation' or 'Closed - Won' → Commercialized; map any active agreement with Exclusive/Non-Exclusive License type → Licensed; all other statuses → Not Licensed or Commercialized. Logic should also check existence of Agreement records.

iEdison Description: Year of first commercial sale. Required if latestStageDev = Commercialized.
Transformation Notes: No year-of-first-sale field in TTS. New field needed on Technology or the new Utilization Report object.

iEdison Description: Total royalty/option/licence income for the reporting year. Required if latestStageDev = Commercialized or Licensed.
Transformation Notes: Aggregate SUM of TTS_Transaction__c where Type IN ('Royalties', 'Licence Income') AND Direction = 'Incoming' AND year(Transaction Date) = reportingYear. Requires date-scoped SOQL aggregate.

iEdison Description: Number of exclusive licences or options. Required if latestStageDev = Commercialized or Licensed (v2 / reportingYear ≤ 2023).
Transformation Notes: COUNT of TTS_Agreement__c records where Agreement_Type__c = 'Exclusive License' AND Technology = this Technology AND Status is active.

iEdison Description: Number of non-exclusive licences or options. Required if latestStageDev = Commercialized or Licensed.
Transformation Notes: COUNT of TTS_Agreement__c where Agreement_Type__c = 'Non-Exclusive License' AND Technology = this Technology AND Status is active.

iEdison Description: Number of licences/options granted to small businesses.
Transformation Notes: No small business flag on Account or Agreement in TTS. New checkbox field needed on Agreement or Agreement Party.

iEdison Description: Name of the licensee. Required per licensee for reportingYear ≥ 2024 (v3).
Transformation Notes: Account.Name via Agreement.Licensee_Account__c lookup. Must be unique per submission.

iEdison Description: Number of exclusive licences held by this licensee
Transformation Notes: COUNT of active Exclusive License agreements per licensee Account.

iEdison Description: Number of non-exclusive licences held by this licensee
Transformation Notes: COUNT of active Non-Exclusive License agreements per licensee Account.

iEdison Description: True if the licensee is a small business
Transformation Notes: No small business flag in TTS. Same gap as smallBusinessLicensesOptions.

iEdison Description: Is US manufacturing required under the licence? (Y / N). Required for reportingYear ≥ 2023.
Transformation Notes: No US manufacturing requirement tracking in TTS. New picklist/checkbox field needed on Technology or Utilization Report.

iEdison Description: Does any licence contain a US manufacturing requirement? (Y / N / N/A). Required for reportingYear ≥ 2023.
Transformation Notes: Same gap as isUSManufacturingRequired1.

iEdison Description: Is any product being manufactured in the US under this licence? (Y / N / N/A). Required for reportingYear ≥ 2023.
Transformation Notes: Same gap as isUSManufacturingRequired1.

iEdison Description: Commercialisation plan (1–6): 1=Seeking funding; 2=Marketing/developing; 3=Internal use only; 4=Self-commercialise; 5=Distribution/research only; 6=No current plan. Required if latestStageDev = Not Licensed or Commercialized.
Transformation Notes: No standardised commercialisation plan field in TTS. New picklist needed on Technology or Utilization Report.

iEdison Description: Notes. Required if commercializationPlanId = 3 or 6.
Transformation Notes: Could source from Technology.techstarter__IP_Commercial_Market__c or a new notes field on the Utilization Report object.

iEdison Description: Name of a commercial product manufactured using or embodying the invention. Must be unique.
Transformation Notes: No manufacturing product tracking in TTS. Out of scope for initial implementation.

iEdison Description: Name of the manufacturer for this product
Transformation Notes: No manufacturer tracking in TTS.

iEdison Description: Country where the product is manufactured
Transformation Notes: No product manufacturing location in TTS.

iEdison Description: US state where the product is manufactured
Transformation Notes: No product manufacturing location in TTS.

iEdison Description: FDA-approved commercial product name
Transformation Notes: No FDA product approval tracking in TTS. Out of scope for initial implementation.

iEdison Description: FDA approval number
Transformation Notes: No FDA tracking in TTS.

iEdison Description: FDA product type: Biologic, Medical Device, Drug
Transformation Notes: No FDA tracking in TTS.

iEdison Description: New US jobs created. DOE inventions only.
Transformation Notes: DOE-specific. Out of scope unless institution has DOE funding.

iEdison Description: New US companies created. DOE inventions only.
Transformation Notes: DOE-specific. Out of scope unless institution has DOE funding.

iEdison Description: Domestic manufacture waiver (1=Yes, 0=No). Fiscal year 2022 and prior only.
Transformation Notes: Historical field. Low priority; only relevant for back-reporting.

iEdison Description: Number of domestic manufacture waivers obtained. Fiscal year 2022 and prior only.
Transformation Notes: Historical field. Low priority.
